full_content:
Batch formalization: Fresh sessions must self-initialize with role disclosure, dashboard linkage, top priorities, and token-budget options.

Owner directive:
- Fresh session self-initialization must present the user with information on the role being assumed, including a listing of skills, plug-ins, directives, and governance stance for the session.
- Fresh session self-initialization must display a live link to the project dashboard showing time-series KPI for GT-KB artifacts and subsystems, including backlog, MemBase, Deliberation Archive, tests, templates, specifications, drift, regression, contention, and tokens consumed at session start before user input.
- Fresh session self-initialization must propose the three top priority actions for the user to initiate, such as backlog work, hygiene, remediation, state investigation, or release-blocker itemization.
- Fresh session self-initialization must suggest options for reducing token consumption during startup and ongoing project work, processes, artifacts, or governance.

Artifacts to create:
- DELIB-0840: owner decision establishing the fresh-session self-initialization requirement.
- GOV-SESSION-SELF-INITIALIZATION-001: governance requirement for session startup disclosure and action options.
- PB-SESSION-STARTUP-GOVERNANCE-DISCLOSURE-001: protected behavior preventing sessions from treating role/governance context as implicit.
- SPEC-PROJECT-DASHBOARD-KPI-LINK-001: requirement for a live project dashboard link with GT-KB subsystem time-series KPI.
- DCL-SESSION-STARTUP-TOKEN-BUDGET-001: design constraint requiring visible token-cost awareness and reduction options during startup.
- GTKB-GOV-011: standing backlog implementation item for startup self-initialization dashboard and disclosure mechanics.

Implementation status:
- Formal records, rule text, standing backlog visibility, and regression tests are created now.
- Full live dashboard implementation may remain implementation-gated until GTKB-GOV-011 is completed; the gap must remain visible in the standing backlog and release-gate tests.
explicit_change_request: Owner said fresh session self-initialization should disclose role, skills, plug-ins, directives, governance stance, dashboard link, top three priority actions, and token-reduction options.
change_reason: Formalize fresh-session self-initialization startup requirements and implementation backlog visibility.
